name: core.openwop.agent-examples
description: Reference / smoke-fixture agent pack. Exercises every shape on agent-manifest.schema.json: inline systemPrompt, systemPromptRef, conversation memory, scratchpad memory, non-empty toolAllowlist, and handoff.{task,return}SchemaRef. Validates the `agents[]` extension to the pack manifest (per agent-manifest.schema.json + RFC 0003). Vendor-neutral: no model pinned — hosts resolve via their BYOK aiProviders surface.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

agents.label: Echo Agent
agents.description: Repeats the user's most recent message back verbatim. Smoke fixture for the agent-dispatch lifecycle.
agents.systemPrompt: You are Echo. Repeat the user's most recent message back verbatim. Do not analyze, paraphrase, embellish, or add commentary. If the message is empty, respond with exactly the empty string.

agents.label: Summarizer Agent
agents.description: Produces a 2-3 sentence summary of arbitrary input text. Demonstrates the `systemPromptRef` path — the prompt body lives in `prompts/summarizer.md` rather than inlined in the manifest.

agents.label: Chat Agent
agents.description: Multi-turn conversational agent. Smoke fixture for `memoryShape.conversation: true` — exercises per-run dialogue memory binding through the conversation channel (RFC 0005). No tools, no long-term memory.

agents.label: Structured Fixture Agent
agents.description: Schema-validated extraction smoke fixture. Exercises `handoff.taskSchemaRef` + `handoff.returnSchemaRef` — both tarball-relative paths to JSON Schema 2020-12 documents. Hosts validate inbound payloads against `taskSchemaRef` before dispatch and outbound results against `returnSchemaRef` before persistence.

agents.label: Tool Caller Agent
agents.description: Non-empty toolAllowlist smoke fixture. Exercises the runtime's tool-allowlist enforcement boundary established by safety-fix OPENWOP-AUDIT-2026-003 (`SECURITY/invariants.yaml#agents-run-no-raw-handler`). Requires the host to advertise `host.agentRuntime` per RFC 0007.
